Uses of Class
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry.AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor

Packages that use AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.

  • Uses of AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry

    Subclasses of AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicFailoverExpiryExtractor
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor that interprets expression strings as plain literals: durations are parsed with Long.parseLong(java.lang.String, int) and units with ChronoUnit.valueOf(java.lang.String).
    class 
    BeanFactoryFailoverExpiryExtractor
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor that resolves expiry expressions via Spring's ConfigurableBeanFactory.resolveEmbeddedValue(java.lang.String), supporting property placeholders (e.g.
